name: Image Gen (Stability AI)
author: RAGdoll
description: Generate images with Stability AI's Stable Diffusion via the REST API.
long_description: Adds a `generate_image_stability` tool that calls the Stability AI REST API (stable-image/generate/core) and returns a base64 data URI of the generated image.

config_fields.label: Stability API Key
config_fields.help: Your Stability AI API key from platform.stability.ai.
